confirmed_root_cause: rate limiter misconfigured to apply global limits instead of per-user limits
resolution_action: rollback rate limiter configuration and restore per-user limits

confirmed_root_cause: missing database index causing full table scans under load
resolution_action: added appropriate index and optimized slow queries

confirmed_root_cause: JWT signing key rotated without updating all services
resolution_action: synchronized JWT keys across services and redeployed auth service

symptoms: orders created but inventory not updated

resolution_action: fixed exception handling and restarted consumer service

resolution_action: fixed cache invalidation and flushed stale cache entries

confirmed_root_cause: memory leak in request handling logic

resolution_action: increased connection pool size and optimized usage

confirmed_root_cause: inefficient algorithm introduced in new release

confirmed_root_cause: worker instances insufficient for current load
